reasoning: My father has been saying Modi and the new government are good for Matua people like us — the CAA, he says, is for families like mine with grandfather's papers. Shantanu Thakur is Matua, he is a Union Minister now, someone from our community in real power. That matters. The Kanyashree money still comes, yes, but Sandeshkhali — people are saying bad things about that government now, and I don't know what to trust anymore. But I know Thakur, I know he is one of us. This time I am voting for someone from my own people, someone who rose up. I hope he remembers girls like me.
primary_drivers: Shantanu Thakur as Matua community representative in Union government
Father's steady support for Modi; family narrative around CAA
Uncertainty about AITC after Sandeshkhali scandal despite lingering loyalty to programs
